sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48807" key="qhrofoneu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θηρο-φονεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n48807.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slayer of beasts</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:538" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.538</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
